title: Automata Forge
description: A from-scratch theory-of-computation lab. Compile a regex into a parse tree, Thompson e-NFA, subset-construction DFA, Hopcroft-minimized DFA and a Brzozowski-derivative DFA, then step strings through any of them. NEW: a two-regex Compare workbench that builds the product automaton for union, intersection, difference and symmetric difference, decides equivalence and containment, and proves inequality with the shortest distinguishing string; a pumping-lemma playground; a live derivative explorer; Graphviz DOT / SVG export; and shareable permalinks. No libraries — every algorithm, the graph layout and the SVG renderer are hand-written.
